# Start Project Setup

Use the shared `start` workflow from `docs/assistant_workflows.md`.

The user wants to initialize this template for a real project. Read the repo structure, then interview the user one or two questions at a time until you can fully populate the project docs.

If the user typed `/start`, treat it as a request for this workflow. Do not imply that `/start` is a native Copilot slash command in this repository.
